samples.xml_description: Implement a module of a carry-lookahead 32-bit adder that uses the Carry-Lookahead Adder (CLA) architecture. 32-bit input operand A. 32-bit input operand B. 32-bit output representing the sum of A and B. Carry-out output. None. // Calculate generate and propagate wire [32:1] G, P; assign G = A & B; assign P = A | B; // Calculate sum assign S[1] = A[1] ^ B[1] ^ C32; assign S[32:2] = A[32:2] ^ B[32:2] ^ (C32 & P[32:1]); // Calculate carry-out assign C32 = G[32] | (P[32] & C1); Calculates the sum of A and B, including overflow. Follow the block diagram in the lab description.
